description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a large, covered front porch supported by posts. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored panels with darker trim, evoking a timber-framed or half-timbered style. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, with two small dormer windows on the upper level. The house includes a side extension with a sloped roof and an external staircase leading to a raised platform, possibly serving as a secondary entrance or balcony. The porch and side platform are elevated and supported by wooden posts, with railings and steps providing access. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and rustic architectural elements, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, large covered porch, timber-style trim, and symmetrical windows, featuring a side extension with an external staircase and raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large covered porch, and symmetrical windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the side extension, and the sloped roof over the platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, upper story, and the side platform with supporting posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the external staircase, side platform, and two small dormer windows on the upper floor.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with supporting posts, steps, and a simple door, complemented by a side platform and external staircase.
